name: opencode
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates tmux && sudo install -d -o vscode -g vscode /home/vscode/.local /home/vscode/.local/share /home/vscode/.opencode /home/vscode/.opencode/bin && curl -fsSL https://opencode.ai/install | bash && export PATH=/home/vscode/.opencode/bin:/home/vscode/.local/bin:$PATH && command -v opencode && opencode --version && echo "set -s escape-time 10" > ~/.tmux.conf'
